text:
by NCPDP to specify a tertiary dispenser type. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: TERTIARY_TAXONOMY_CODE 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 10 

SOURCE: NCDPD DataQ™ 

VALUES: (e.g., 3336C0003X), or null/missing (n/a) 

COMMENT: This taxonomy code applies to the tertiary dispenser type (variable called 
TERTIARY_DISPENSER_TYPE). For each pharmacy, there is information for up to three taxonomy 
codes, associated with each of the dispenser types (reference PRIMARY_TAXONOMY_CODE and 
SECONDARY_TAXONOMY_CODE
